name: soil-editor
description: CRITERIA 1D is a one-dimensional agro-hydrological model. It includes soil water fluxes, crop development and water needs, a GIS interface (CRITERIA GEO) for geographical simulations and tools to manage crop and soil parameters. The software is written in C++ using Qt libraries, so cross-platform building is possible (Windows, Linux, MacOS). Soil editor is a tool to edit the soil properties. It uses a modified Van Genuchten - Mualem model to estimate the water retention and hydraulic c onductivity curves.
